name: screen-off
title: Screen off
description: Turn off your display and control caffeinate from the menu bar. Keep your Mac awake while the screen is off.
author: kushagra_tiwari

commands.name: index
commands.title: Screen off
commands.description: Menu bar icon to turn off display and control caffeinate

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
